evidence: The authors explicitly use permutation-based variable importance, stating: "Variable importance measures a feature's importance by calculating the degradation of the predictive accuracy of the model after randomly permuting the values of the feature." They corroborate rankings with partial dependence plots: "PDPs hence help visualize the relationship, learned by a model, between a feature and the response" and identify primary predictors as "the top three most important predictors of the VIP."
